name: Soursop Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the soursop and place in a colander to remove seeds and secure pulp.
2. Combine 2 cups soursop pulp with ginger juice, lime juice, vanilla flavoring, and condensed milk.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
4. Pour the mixture into either a conventional ice cream freezer or an ice cube tray.
5. Freeze until solid. Yield: 1 quart.
